goal: Reframe the portfolio materials into a clear media design project narrative with five pillars: clarity, aesthetics, research question, prototype evidence, and future potential.
constraints: This task is documentation-only; do not modify runtime gameplay code.
Keep the vertical-slice constraints unchanged: 2 schools, 1 topic, 1 battleground, 12-20 cards, 3 rounds.
Portfolio text must be value-first and review-friendly, not implementation-detail-heavy.
If any external submission artifact remains missing, keep it as UNKNOWN and keep open question tracking consistent.
deliverables: Rewritten portfolio README in a five-pillar media design structure.
Updated demo script framed as prototype evidence for media design review.
Updated research proposal centered on a concise core research question and expansion trajectory.
